description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone obelisk monument, likely made of weathered marble or granite, standing on a multi-tiered square base. The obelisk features draped sculptural elements and relief carvings, including a shrouded urn or flame motif at the top, which is a common funerary symbol. Several faces of the monument display engraved inscriptions, some of which are partially legible, indicating its commemorative or memorial function. The base is robust and slightly wider than the shaft, with visible signs of aging and discoloration, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. Decorative garlands and drapery motifs are present on the upper sections, adding to its solemn and classical appearance. The overall structure is imposing and would serve as a prominent landmark in a park, cemetery, or urban square.
description: A tall, ornate stone obelisk monument with draped sculptural elements, engraved inscriptions, and a multi-tiered square base, showing signs of weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription panel, draped sculptural motifs, and the shrouded urn or flame at the top.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal inscription, mostly plain stone surface, and visible weathering on the base.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the draped motifs and partial visibility of the inscription panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another inscription panel and more pronounced decorative garlands.
attribute_inscription: Multiple engraved inscriptions are visible on the front and side panels, in serifed Roman-style English text. The inscriptions are moderately legible, with some weathering obscuring parts of the text.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative draped garlands and a shrouded urn or flame motif adorn the upper section. Relief carvings and classical motifs are present on the shaft and near the top.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, square platform with beveled edges and a slightly wider footprint than the shaft. It shows signs of aging, with discoloration and minor surface erosion.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features a sculpted urn or flame, shrouded with drapery, serving as a symbolic funerary element. The finish is rough and weathered.
